description: CompositionYellow round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, ribbed neckline with a multi-coloured twill in-seam, half sleeves and graphic print with a jean effect on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments lee owes a lot to its growth to Kansas City for giving it that platform to set shop and grow into a worldwide favourite brand. This yellow cotton t-shirt from lee pays tribute to the city of Kansas with its stylish chest print. So if you are that true Lee fan, don this tee and join your favourite brand in thanking the city of its origin. Team this T-shirt with jeans and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
